results.title: India Keeps SCO Engagement Active as Jaishankar Meets Secretary General Nurlan Yermekbayev
results.description: According to the report, Jaishankar and Yermekbayev discussed the SCO’s initiatives and activities as well as key regional and global issues. The wording is brief, but the context is important. The SCO has become one of the central multilateral platforms connecting South Asia, Central Asia, Russia, China and the wider Eurasian region. For India, such engagement matters because Central Asia remains important for energy security, trade routes, counter-terrorism cooperation and long-term connectivity planning. The post India Keeps SCO Engagement Active as Jaishankar Meets Secretary General Nurlan Yermekbayev appeared first on Dharmakshethra - India Unabridged .

results.title: Karnataka Cricketer S.L.Akshay died of heart attack
results.description: Cricketer Santebenneur Lokesh Akshay of Bengaluru. Karnatak has passed away at the age of 39 due to a heart attack.

results.title: Rubio says Trump won’t make a 'bad deal,' flags terror groups operating in Pakistan
results.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio said Iran talks are still ongoing and the US is prioritising diplomacy, while backing President Trump’s stance of not rushing a deal and reiterating concerns over terror groups operating from Pakistan.

results.title: West Asia conflict may dent India Inc profitability by 200 bps: Crisil
results.description: A prolonged West Asia conflict poses a risk to India Inc's profitability. Crisil Ratings predicts a significant drop in operating margins due to supply chain issues and rising costs. However, strong company balance sheets are expected to protect overall credit quality. Some sectors like ceramics and airlines face severe stress. Other export-oriented sectors might benefit from a weaker rupee.
